Bus Timings

Bus 61D Schedule Nad Al Shiba, Clinic to Ghubaiba Bus Station

February 25, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Alright, let’s chat about Bus 61D - it’s the real MVP when it comes to getting around Dubai. This bad boy cruises between Nad Al Shiba and Ghubaiba, hitting up all sorts of important spots along the way. Whether you’re a local just trying to get to work or a tourist out to explore, 61D’s got your back.

Trust me, it’s a game-changer for anyone who needs to bounce between different parts of the city without the hassle of driving. So next time you’re scratching your head wondering how to get from A to B in Dubai, remember good ol’ 61D.

Route Name 61D
Route Description Nad Al Shiba, Clinic - Ghubaiba Bus Station · 6
Total Distance Approximately 41.05 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 72 minutes
Operational Hours 07:30 to 20:05 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus 61D Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The timings for Bus 61D are as follows:

From Nad Al Shiba, Clinic From Ghubaiba Bus Station
08:30 07:30
18:01 17:00
20:05 19:03

Bus 61D Timetable

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 61D is AED 3. This price is designed to be affordable, making it a practical choice for daily commutes or occasional travel. Passengers can enjoy a cost-effective means of getting around Dubai, whether traveling for work, errands, or leisure. This consistent pricing ensures that everyone can access the service without financial strain.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 61D does not offer online booking options. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route without needing a prior reservation. For real-time updates and additional route information, passengers are encouraged to use the RTA Dubai app or check with the bus stations.

Bus Route

  1. Nad Al Shiba, Clinic

  2. ENBD HQ

  3. Wasl Club

  4. Latifa Hospital

  5. Oud Metha Road, 2

  6. Oud Metha Road

  7. Oud Metha Metro · 2

  8. BurJuman Metro, 3

  9. Four Point Sheraton Hotel

  10. Sharaf DG Metro · 3

  11. Sharaf DG Metro · 1

  12. Nahda Street

  13. Raffa

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 6

Some other Dubai bus routes you can check are the 66 bus route, which runs from Ghubaiba Bus Station to Faqa, Terminus / Al Faqa’a Family Park, and the 67 route, which operates from Endurance City Terminus to Ghubaiba Bus Station.

Bus 61D Station Overview

Nad Al Shiba, Clinic

Nad Al Shiba, Clinic is a key bus station located near a prominent healthcare facility in the Nad Al Shiba area. This station is well-equipped with amenities designed to accommodate a steady flow of passengers, including covered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates.

The station’s facilities ensure a comfortable and efficient travel experience for all passengers using this route.

Intersecting Bus Routes at Burjuman Metro Bus Stop

The Burjuman Metro Bus Stop serves as a major transit hub where several bus routes intersect, enhancing connectivity for passengers throughout Dubai. Key routes that converge at this station include 66, 67, 61D, C03, C18, F70, X23, and X25.

This central location provides seamless travel options across different city areas, making it a vital stop for commuters and ensuring efficient access to various destinations.

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 6

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 6 is a major transit hub within the Ghubaiba area of Dubai. It is designed to handle a high volume of commuters with amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing counters, and up-to-date bus schedule information.

This station serves as a critical connection point for passengers traveling to and from various destinations across the city. Its central location facilitates easy access to nearby commercial and residential areas, making it an integral part of the local transportation network.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Several notable tourist attractions and destinations are accessible along the Bus 61D route:

  1. Latifa Hospital: While primarily a healthcare facility, it’s located in a well-connected area close to various amenities and attractions in Dubai.

  2. Oud Metha Metro Station: This station is near the Dubai Creek area, which is a popular spot for visitors. It offers scenic views of the creek and access to nearby attractions.

  3. BurJuman Metro Station: Located near BurJuman Mall, one of Dubai’s prominent shopping centers. The mall includes a variety of shops, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

  4. Four Points Sheraton Hotel: Situated in the vicinity of BurJuman, this hotel offers accommodations close to several attractions and is a popular choice for travelers.

5.

  1. Nad Al Shiba: While more residential, this area offers local parks and community spaces that can be enjoyable for visitors.

These stops provide convenient access to some of Dubai’s key areas, shopping centers, and cultural spots.

Journey Experience

Taking Bus Route 61D from Nad Al Shiba, Clinic to Ghubaiba Bus Station offers a unique glimpse into the heart of Dubai as you traverse through diverse neighborhoods. The journey begins in Nad Al Shiba, an area known for its quiet residential streets and proximity to the iconic Meydan Racecourse, famous for hosting the Dubai World Cup.

Continuing on, the bus moves toward the bustling Al Fahidi Historic District, where you can admire traditional Emirati architecture and visit the Dubai Museum housed in the Al Fahidi Fort.

The route concludes at Ghubaiba Bus Station, a key transit hub that connects you to various other destinations, enhancing the travel experience with its lively atmosphere and convenience. This trip not only provides an efficient means of transportation but also showcases the rich tapestry of Dubai’s urban landscape.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can travel to Ghubaiba Bus Station · 6, the furthest point on the Bus 61D route starting from Nad Al Shiba, Clinic. The fare for this journey ranges from AED 58 to AED 70.

In summary, Bus 61D serves as an important route in Dubai’s public transport network, offering reliable service between Nad Al Shiba and Ghubaiba. Its strategic stops and regular schedule make it a valuable option for commuters and travelers across the city. While online booking is not available, the straightforward boarding process and affordable fare ensure that Bus 61D remains a practical choice for navigating Dubai’s bustling urban landscape.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: February 25, 2026.
